# Inalpha

> Open-source framework for agent-driven quantitative research and simulated trading workflows.

## Website
- https://inalpha.dev/ — English homepage
- https://inalpha.dev/zh/ — 中文首页
- https://inalpha.dev/privacy/ — Privacy policy
- https://inalpha.dev/terms/ — Terms, risk disclosure, and license information

## Project sources
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha — Source code and issues
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha/blob/main/README.md — English README
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha/blob/main/README.zh-CN.md — 中文 README
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha/tree/main/docs — Public documentation index
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha/blob/main/docs/00-context.md — Project context
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha/blob/main/docs/01-architecture-overview.md — Architecture overview
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha/blob/main/docs/03-kernel-design.md — Service and kernel design
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha/blob/main/docs/04-current-state.md — Current project state
- https://github.com/mirror29/inalpha/blob/main/LICENSE — AGPL-3.0 license

## Scope
- Inalpha supports research, backtesting, and simulated-account workflows.
- It does not provide live brokerage execution or financial advice.
- Review the repository and public documentation for current capabilities and limitations.

## Notes
- This file is a navigation aid for language models and other tools.
- It does not grant crawl access, guarantee indexing, or affect rankings.
